mapper.select: SELECT * FROM SUPPLIES ORDER BY CASE STATUS WHEN 'EMPTY' THEN 1 WHEN 'LOW' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, SUPPLY_CODE ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SUPPLIES ( SUPPLY_SEQ, SUPPLY_NAME, CATEGORY, SUPPLY_CODE, TOTAL_QTY, STOCK_QTY, MIN_STOCK_QTY, STATUS, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( supply_seq.NEXTVAL, #{supply_name}, #{category}, #{supply_code}, #{total_qty}, #{stock_qty}, #{min_stock_qty}, CASE WHEN #{stock_qty} = 0 THEN 'EMPTY' WHEN #{stock_qty} <= #{min_stock_qty} THEN 'LOW' ELSE 'ENOUGH' END, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SUPPLIES WHERE SUPPLY_CODE = #{supply_code}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM SUPPLIES WHERE SUPPLY_SEQ IN
#{seq}
mapper.update: UPDATE SUPPLIES SET SUPPLY_NAME=#{supply_name}, CATEGORY=#{category}, TOTAL_QTY=#{total_qty}, MIN_STOCK_QTY=#{min_stock_qty}, STATUS = CASE WHEN STOCK_QTY = 0 THEN 'EMPTY' WHEN STOCK_QTY <= #{min_stock_qty} THEN 'LOW' ELSE 'ENOUGH' END WHERE SUPPLY_SEQ = #{supply_seq}
mapper.select:
SELECT r.REQ_SEQ, r.REQ_DATE, r.USERS_ID, u.NAME, r.REASON, r.STATUS, i.ITEM_SEQ, i.SUPPLY_SEQ, i.EA, i.USE_TYPE, s.SUPPLY_NAME FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rn, a.* FROM ( SELECT r.REQ_SEQ, r.REQ_DATE, r.USERS_ID, r.REASON, r.STATUS FROM SUPPLY_REQUEST r LEFT JOIN USERS u ON r.USERS_ID = u.ID
AND ( u.NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR r.REQ_SEQ IN ( SELECT i2.REQ_SEQ FROM SUPPLY_REQUEST_ITEMS i2 JOIN SUPPLIES s2 ON i2.SUPPLY_SEQ = s2.SUPPLY_SEQ WHERE s2.SUPPLY_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ) )
AND r.STATUS = #{status}
ORDER BY r.REQ_DATE ASC, r.REQ_SEQ ASC ) a ) WHERE rn BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} ) r JOIN USERS u ON r.USERS_ID = u.ID JOIN SUPPLY_REQUEST_ITEMS i ON r.REQ_SEQ = i.REQ_SEQ JOIN SUPPLIES s ON i.SUPPLY_SEQ = s.SUPPLY_SEQ ORDER BY rn ASC, i.ITEM_SEQ ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT REQ_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO SUPPLY_REQUEST VALUES (#{req_seq}, #{users_id}, #{req_date}, #{reason}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT DEPT_SEQ FROM USERS WHERE ID = #{users_id}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rn, a.* FROM ( SELECT r.RENTAL_SEQ, s.SUPPLY_NAME, r.SUPPLY_SEQ, s.CATEGORY, s.SUPPLY_CODE, d.DEPT_NAME, u.NAME, r.EA, r.RENTAL_DATE, r.RETURN_DATE FROM SUPPLY_RENTAL r JOIN SUPPLIES s ON r.SUPPLY_SEQ = s.SUPPLY_SEQ JOIN USERS u ON r.USERS_ID = u.ID JOIN DEPARTMENTS d ON r.DEPT_SEQ = d.DEPT_SEQ
AND (s.SUPPLY_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR u.NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR d.DEPT_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR s.SUPPLY_CODE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
AND ( CASE WHEN #{status} = 'RENTING' THEN CASE WHEN r.RETURN_DATE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ELSE CASE WHEN r.RETURN_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END END ) = 1
ORDER BY r.RENTAL_DATE DESC ) a ) WHERE rn BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SUPPLY_RENTAL r JOIN SUPPLIES s ON r.SUPPLY_SEQ = s.SUPPLY_SEQ JOIN USERS u ON r.USERS_ID = u.ID JOIN DEPARTMENTS d ON r.DEPT_SEQ = d.DEPT_SEQ
AND (s.SUPPLY_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR u.NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR d.DEPT_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR s.SUPPLY_CODE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
AND ( CASE WHEN #{status} = 'RENTING' THEN CASE WHEN r.RETURN_DATE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ELSE CASE WHEN r.RETURN_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END END ) = 1
